title: elaeocarpus kinabaluensis
intro: Elaeocarpus kinabaluensis, a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family, is native to the mountainous regions of Borneo. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which have been attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Consuming Elaeocarpus kinabaluensis is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared in the form of a tea or a tincture, with some herbalists recommending a dose of 10-20 drops of the tincture per day.
